_comments.strategy: strat_1 = Code Obfuscation, strat_2 = Error Handling, strat_3 = Reusability, strat_4 = Security, strat_5 = Obfuscation+Anti-debug, strat_6 = API replacement, strat_all = Chain all strategies
_comments.skip_over: Number of functions to skip from the beginning of the selected function list (default: 0)
_comments.func_batch_size: Number of functions to send per LLM call (default: 1, use -1 for all at once)
_comments.source_code_response_format: Format for parsing LLM response: 'backticks' or 'json' (default: backticks)
_comments.retry_generation_attempts: Number of retry attempts when LLM fails to generate valid code (default: 5)
_comments.strat_all_order: Order of strategies to chain when strategy is 'strat_all' (default: [strat_1, strat_5, strat_6])
_comments.optimization: Options: O0, O1, O2, O3, Os
_comments.auto_fix: Enable automatic error fixing when compilation fails
_comments.max_fix_attempts: Maximum number of fix attempts (INCREASED from 5 to 10 for better success rate)
_comments.use_llm_fixer: Use LLM-powered fixer (true) or simple pattern-based fixer (false)
_comments.llm_fixer_max_code_length: Maximum source code length in characters for LLM fixer (default: 50000). Files larger than this will use pattern-based fixer
_comments.permissive_mode: Try permissive compilation flags on first failure
_comments.pre_validate: Run validation checks before compilation (checks for duplicate symbols, missing entry points, system redefinitions)
_comments.auto_generate_headers: Automatically generate project-wide header with all declarations
_comments.use_enhanced_categorization: Use enhanced error categorization to separate syntax vs linker errors
_comments.use_project_context: Provide LLM fixer with project-wide context (functions, types, dependencies)
_comments.protect_headers: NEW: Use protected mode when fixing header files (only add includes/declarations, never modify existing code)
_comments.inject_forward_declarations: NEW: Automatically inject forward declarations for missing symbols
_comments.apply_compiler_compatibility: NEW: Apply GCC/MinGW compatibility fixes (wrap MSVC SEH, fix wide strings, etc.) â€” SKIPPED when compiler is 'msvc'
_comments.validate_llm_fixes: NEW: Validate LLM-generated fixes before applying (check for syntax errors, invalid characters, etc.)
_comments.use_hybrid_llm: HYBRID MODE: Use local Ollama for simple cases, Mistral API for complex cases (saves cost)
_comments.hybrid_local_model: Local Ollama model name (e.g., qwen2.5-coder:7b-instruct-q4_K_M for RTX 4050)
_comments.hybrid_cloud_file_size_limit: Max file size (chars) for using cloud API. Files BELOW this use cloud (fast), ABOVE use local (cost-effective)
_comments.preserve_signatures: Keep function signatures unchanged during mutation (only modify body)
_comments.preserve_entry_points: Never mutate entry points (main, WinMain, DllMain)
_comments.preserve_critical_functions: Don't mutate functions with critical prefixes or export markers
_comments.filter_unsafe_candidates: Filter out cross-file referenced and exported functions from mutation
_comments.sandbox_enabled: STAGE 6: Enable sandbox behavioral analysis after compilation
_comments.sandbox_api_url: REST API URL of your sandbox server (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:8090)
_comments.sandbox_api_token: API authentication token (optional for local CAPE installs)
_comments.sandbox_machine: Specific VM name to use (empty = auto-select)
_comments.sandbox_analysis_timeout: Max analysis time inside sandbox VM in seconds (default: 120)
_comments.sandbox_max_wait: Max total wait time for results in seconds (default: 600)
_comments.sandbox_submit_original: Also submit original (unmodified) executable for behavioral comparison
_comments.sandbox_original_executables: Map of project_name -> path to original .exe for comparison
